dashboard.title: Koi Pond Dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: Professional water quality & fish care tracking
dashboard.addUpdateKoiInfo: Add or update information about your koi
dashboard.phosphateWarning: Phosphate levels are elevated. Consider water change or phosphate remover.
dashboard.nitrateWarning: Nitrate levels are getting high. A partial water change is recommended.
dashboard.lowPhWarning: pH is too low (acidic). This can cause gill damage and stress. Add pH up products gradually.
dashboard.highPhWarning: pH is too high (alkaline). This can lead to ammonia toxicity. Add pH down products gradually.
dashboard.phWarning: pH is outside optimal range. Monitor closely and adjust if needed.
dashboard.lowTempWarning: Water temperature is dangerously low. Koi may become stressed or go into hibernation.
dashboard.highTempWarning: Water temperature is dangerously high. This can cause oxygen depletion and stress.
dashboard.temperatureWarning: Water temperature is outside optimal range. Monitor koi behavior closely.
dashboard.nitriteDangerWarning: Nitrite levels are dangerously high! This is toxic to koi. Immediate water change required.
dashboard.nitrateDangerWarning: Nitrate levels are dangerously high! Large water change required immediately.
dashboard.phosphateDangerWarning: Phosphate levels are dangerously high! This can cause algae blooms and health issues.

analytics.title: Analytics
analytics.subtitle: Historical data and trends coming soon with Supabase integration
analytics.description: This section will show water parameter trends over time once you connect Supabase for data storage.

recommendations.title: Smart Recommendations
recommendations.subtitle: AI-driven advice based on your water quality

descriptions.water_change_critical: Critical water parameters detected. Immediate water change required to protect fish health.
descriptions.water_change_warning: Multiple water parameters are outside ideal ranges. A water change will help restore balance.
descriptions.filter_maintenance: Nitrogen cycle parameters suggest filter efficiency may be reduced. Clean or replace filter media.
descriptions.ph_low: pH is too low. Add baking soda or crushed coral to raise pH gradually.
descriptions.ph_high: pH is too high. Add peat moss or driftwood to lower pH naturally.
descriptions.temperature_low: Water temperature is too cold. Consider using a pond heater or increase aeration.
descriptions.temperature_high: Water temperature is too warm. Increase shade, aeration or add cool water.
descriptions.chemical_treatment: Critical water parameters detected. Consider emergency water treatment products to stabilize conditions quickly.

recommendations.no_action_needed: All parameters are within ideal values. No action required.
